desc: Distribute Dimensions vertically with a uniform spacing.
summary: Distribute Dimensions vertically with a uniform spacing.
usecase: Drawing presentation — uniform stacking of dimensions.
notfor: Aligning to a reference line (use AlignDimensionsToReferenceLineCommand when built).
precondition: Active document open; at least one dimension id supplied; spacing > 0.
postcondition: Every input dimension moved by (index × spacing) on Y. One committed Transaction.
logictree: 1) Resolver_DimensionIdsCsv → list of ids; Resolver_SpacingMm (default 300). 2) Resolve dimensions (preserving input order so spacing is predictable). 3) Validate spacing > 0 and ≥ 1 dimension. Else WireError. 4) Open Transaction 'Distribute dimensions'. 5) For i = 0..N-1 move element i by (0, i × spacingFt, 0). 6) Commit. 7) Bot JSON / User toast. 8) Exception → tracker.Fail + WireFault.
